_doc: Aldreth — a FINITE, hand-authored continent traced from the illustrated map (schema v2).
COASTLINE is the authored land mask data/world/masks/aldreth_land.png (traced by
tools/world_trace.gd from data/world/source/aldreth_atlas.png); BiomeClassifier samples it.
Macro-geography: a big irregular MAIN continent (heartlands centre, frostlands NW, volcanic
calamity NE, western marches W, southern fens S) + the SUNSPEAR desert PENINSULA on the SE
cape, with offshore islands: Greywood Isle (W), Ironward Isle (NE), the Verdant Isles (SW),
Ember Isle + Jungle Isle (S). Axes x=east, y=south (chunk units); origin ~ map centre.
Regions are ELLIPSE biome-influence masks (center+radius[rx,ry]+rotation+warp), resolved by
`priority` then specificity, grouped under `macroRegions`; they steer the climate model, they
don't carve land (the mask does). Edit tools/gen_regions.py + re-run, or edit regions here
directly (this file is canonical). `generation` declares placement(fixed)+terrain(baked|
procedural)+persistence; only fixed:false regions (Tanglewild) regenerate at runtime.

coordinateSystem.note: Chunk c -> centre tile (c*16+8). Settlements/roads/features in TILE space.

name: Aldreth
